plan.original_text: How has ARDC's net interest margin changed over the last year?
plan.thesis: ARDC’s income generation improved significantly, with revenue and net income growth indicating favorable credit spreads. If default rates remain contained, distributable yield provides downside support. The thesis fails under a credit deterioration scenario.

steps.description: ARDC net interest margin quarterly timeseries
Change in ARDC net interest margin over the last year

ambiguity_notes.net interest margin: unresolved - specific net interest margin metric for ARDC is not available in the standard fundamental catalog; relying on fallback search.

plan.reasoning: To determine how ARDC's net interest margin has changed over the last year, we fetch the quarterly timeseries for this specific metric over the past 4 quarters. We then compute the delta to measure the absolute change from the beginning to the end of the 1-year period.
